/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,-rpath,'$ORIGIN/../../private' -shared  -o ../../../plugin_output_directory/component_keyring_file.so CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/service_implementation/keyring_encryption_service_definition.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/service_implementation/keyring_generator_service_definition.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/service_implementation/keyring_load_service_definition.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/service_implementation/keyring_keys_metadata_iterator_service_definition.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/service_implementation/keyring_metadata_query_service_definition.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/service_implementation/keyring_reader_service_definition.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/service_implementation/keyring_writer_service_definition.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/backend/backend.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/config/config.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/keyring_file.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_keyring_file.dir/component_callbacks.cc.o  ../../../archive_output_directory/libkeyring_common.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../library_mysys/liblibrary_mysys.a
